_comment: User-facing text for mc-course-intake/mc-course-intake.gs. Edit here; changes are live within ~5 minutes (script cache TTL). Use {{placeholder}} syntax for dynamic values.
approved_body:
Dear {{instructor_name}},

Your MorphoCloud per-course allocation request has been approved!

Course:        {{course_name}}
GitHub Team:   {{team_slug}}
GitHub Repo:   {{repo_url}}

ACTION REQUIRED — you have two pending GitHub invitations to accept:

  1. MorphoCloud organization invitation:
     Log in to GitHub, click your profile picture (top right),
     choose 'Organizations', and accept the MorphoCloud invitation.

  2. Repository invitation ({{repo_name}}):
     In the same 'Organizations' view, or check your GitHub
     notifications for a repository collaboration invitation.

Both must be accepted before you can access the repository and your
team membership becomes active.

Your course repository is being provisioned. Our team will complete
the final setup steps and notify you once it is fully operational
and ready for student enrollment.

Questions? Contact {{contact_email}}

-- The MorphoCloud Team
rejected_body:
Dear {{instructor_name}},

After review, we are unable to approve your MorphoCloud per-course allocation request for "{{course_name}}" at this time.

If you have questions or would like to discuss alternatives, please contact {{contact_email}}.

-- The MorphoCloud Team
